---
title: "Data Dictionary"
---

Every column of every clean asset, defined. Generated from the dictionaries each cleaning
script registers via `write_asset()`, so it always matches the data. Regenerate with
`Rscript run_all.R` (or `source("scripts/03_document.R")`).

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
library(here)
f <- here::here("docs/_generated/dictionary.rds")
if (!file.exists(f)) {
  cat("::: {.callout-note}\nNo assets built yet -- run the pipeline first.\n:::\n")
} else {
  dict <- readRDS(f)
  for (a in sort(unique(dict$asset))) {
    cat("\n\n### ", a, "\n\n")
    print(knitr::kable(dict[dict$asset == a, c("column", "definition")], col.names = c("Column", "Definition")))
  }
}
```
